index.description: With 4 years of experience in backend engineering and network security and analysis, I provide services related to FastAPI and secure API development.
index.typewriter: Specializing in secure API development and backend solutions

about.title: About Me
about.intro: With over four years of experience, I have built and optimized scalable backend systems, integrating advanced security measures to protect data and ensure system integrity. My expertise lies in designing RESTful and GraphQL APIs, implementing authentication protocols, and enhancing system efficiency.
about.passion: I am passionate about problem-solving and innovation, constantly exploring new technologies and methodologies to stay ahead in the field. My work involves collaboration with cross-functional teams, leveraging my skills in cloud computing, DevOps practices, and database management to deliver robust and secure applications.
about.security: In addition to backend development, I have hands-on experience in cybersecurity, including vulnerability assessments, penetration testing, and network security analysis. I thrive in challenging environments, where I can apply my technical expertise to build solutions that drive efficiency and security.

ekg.title: Ensemble ML for Cardiovascular Disease
ekg.description: Using multiple models to train ML models for classifying cardiovascular disorders by analyzing EKG waves.

traffic.title: Traffic Symbol Recognition
traffic.description: Real-time traffic sign detection and classification using YOLOv11n for autonomous driving and road safety applications.

manufacture.title: Manufacturing Database System
manufacture.description: MDBMS-HTML is a front-end project for a Manufacturing DBMS, ensuring an interactive and responsive user interface.

crm.title: Customer Relationship Management
crm.description: A CSRM system designed to streamline and optimize how organizations interact with their customers.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.intro: Feel free to reach out for collaborations, project inquiries, or just to say hello. I'm always excited to discuss new opportunities and challenges.
